The characters of the Willverse — every named person, being and creature with a page. Each is also categorized by book and by series. Seeded from the books; grows with community edits.

; Characters by series
* [[:Category:Traveler's Gate characters|Characters of Traveler's Gate]]
* [[:Category:Elder Empire characters|Characters of Elder Empire]]
* [[:Category:Cradle characters|Characters of Cradle]]
* [[:Category:The Last Horizon characters|Characters of The Last Horizon]]

; Characters by calling
* [[:Category:Magic users|Characters who use magic]]
* [[:Category:Professions|Characters by occupation]]
* [[:Category:Titled characters|Characters holding titles]]
* [[:Category:Viewpoint characters|Characters with point-of-view chapters]]

; Characters across series
* [[:Category:Amalgam|Characters and powers that cross between series]]

[[Category:Content]]
